text:
- Update to 2.3.4
- This ports use PEAR_AUTOINSTALL=yes to generate package list automatically,
  Unfortunatelly, I notice the directory contains spaces were left on the
  system when removing this package. It seems we have a problem in `bsd.pear.mk`.
  I will submit another patch request to resolve above problem.
